creator: mcgovern@spoon.beta.com
text:
When accessing a portal file system, open() call returns -1, with errno
of EINVAL. mount_portal generates syslog messages to the effect of
"invalid arguement send to sendmsg".

How-To-Repeat: 
Create /etc/portal.conf (using example from mount_portal). Mount
portalFS via "mount_portal /etc/portal.conf /p". Then, access entity on portal
filesystem, for instance /p/tcp/localhost/23, or /p/file/etc/login.conf.
